description.value: Create a twisting pattern of colors in 30-foot cube at medium range. All creatures in area make Will saves. Compare your targeting successes to each target's save successes. Those you beat become Charmed and Incapacitated, staring at the pattern. Weave ends for a creature if it takes damage or if someone uses action to shake them (1 success ends effect). Creatures immune to charm are immune.

system.effect: Create a twisting pattern of colors in 30-foot cube at medium range. All creatures in area make Will saves. Compare your targeting successes to each target's save successes. Those you beat become Charmed and Incapacitated, staring at the pattern. Weave ends for a creature if it takes damage or if someone uses action to shake them (1 success ends effect). Creatures immune to charm are immune.
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
